title: taraxacum subulatum
intro: Taraxacum subulatum, also known as the narrow-leaved dandelion or needle-leafed dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, Taraxacum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum subulatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Taraxacum subulatum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also consumed as a food ingredient in salads and as a coffee substitute.
